body:
Hi Amara, just wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week about the energy data infrastructure space — I've been doing some additional digging and I think there are a couple of founders worth getting in front of you sooner rather than later. One in particular, building on top of [DataStream](datastream.io)'s open API layer, is doing something genuinely novel around real-time grid telemetry that I haven't seen anyone else tackle at this fidelity. I know your calendar fills up fast, so I wanted to flag this before the fall conference season really kicks off. Would a 30-minute intro call sometime the week of September 15th work on your end? Happy to send over a brief memo first if that's easier.

— Hannah
